hook.text: UNITED READY TO BID FOR MATEUS FERNANDES

beats.text: INEOS PREPARING A £75M BID THIS WEEK
WEST HAM WANT £80M AND WON'T BE RUSHED
ROMANO CONFIRMS INEOS IN OFFICIAL CONTACT WITH AGENT
FERNANDES IS NOW UNITED'S NUMBER ONE PRIORITY TARGET

caption: Man United are preparing an opening bid of around £75m for West Ham's Mateus Fernandes — Fabrizio Romano says INEOS are in official contact with the 21-year-old's agent Jorge Mendes. West Ham want £80m and may reject the first offer, but Fernandes's camp is confident the deal gets done. The window opens June 15. Is this the midfield upgrade United need? 🔴 REPORTED — per Sky Sports / Fabrizio Romano.
